text:
(i)
Write
ane
that models the
equation t
 remaining
balance
b(x)
after using
the scheme for x days. Explain why it represents
linear decay.
(ii)
After how many
days will t
the balance run out?
(iii)
Make a table of values for x varying
from 1 to 10 days
 and
show how the balance b(x), reduces with time.
